artifacts.name: InstancedBricks unit tests
artifacts.description: 8 unit/behavioral tests for FR-PERF-001 instanced mesh rendering

artifacts.name: Instanced rendering e2e performance spec
artifacts.description: Playwright e2e tests for FPS targets and scale (T-PERF-PERF-001-01, T-PERF-SCALE-001-01)

summary.work_completed: Wrote 8 unit/behavioral tests for InstancedBricks (FR-PERF-001) and improved the Playwright e2e performance spec. Tests cover: InstancedMesh usage, per-type separation, per-instance color, matrix updates, empty scene, draw-call count contract (100/500/1000 bricks), geometry disposal.
key_findings: InstancedBricks.tsx implementation is complete on main — no coding work needed
Existing test file had duplicate test IDs and missing behavioral coverage
jsdom cannot measure real FPS; draw-call count is the correct unit-test proxy
E2E spec fixed: duck-typed isInstancedMesh instead of instanceof THREE.InstancedMesh
FPS thresholds in e2e may need CI-specific tuning

human_review_required.reason: CI runners may not achieve 60/30 FPS; consider test.slow() or lower CI threshold
Tests rely on R3F internal canvas property; may break on R3F version upgrades

recommended_actions: Verify InstancedBricks.tsx is on the feature branch (it is on main)
Run npm test to confirm all 8 unit tests pass
Run npm run test:e2e against dev server to validate performance tests
